title: Don't Build Your Own AI Inference! It's Too Expensive & Risky! #shorts
summary: Building independent AI inference infrastructure is extremely expensive and risky, with high costs and financial risks from potential pivots. The recommendation is to rely on established providers instead of building proprietary infrastructure.
writeup: This short argues against building independent AI inference infrastructure, framing it as both expensive and technically difficult. The financial risk is central: a pivot can strand the investment made in self-hosted inference. The takeaway is to rely on established service providers rather than standing up local inference.
